question:
Directions: Below questions consist of some
statements followed by some conclusions.
Study the following information carefully and
decide which of the following conclusions
logically follows.
 
“A@B” means “Only a few A are B”.
“A%B” means “Some A are B”.
“A$B” means “No B is A”.
“A&B” means “All B are A”.
“A#B” means “Only B is A”.

B # D % A % E $ C
Conclusions:
I. All A can never be C.
II. Some B are not E.
III. Some C are not D.
